headline: House Panel to Probe Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The House Oversight Committee is investigating how customers of Kalshi and Polymarket could be using non-public information to engage in insider trading, escalating concerns about prediction markets after some suspiciously well timed trades. headline: NYSE Owner and OKX Seek to Launch Perpetual Futures Tied to Oil
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Intercontinental Exchange Inc., owner of the New York Stock Exchange, is working with crypto exchange operator OKX to launch oil futures contracts that never expire.
